title: Martin Shkreli on His Love Life
summary: A brief conversation with Martin Shkreli discussing his views on love and romantic relationships. Shkreli expresses skepticism about love as a concept, describing how people become jaded over time and observing that most romantic relationships appear unhealthy or toxic.

key_claims.claim: Love is a fictitious concept for a lot of people
The large majority of romantic relationships are unhealthy or toxic
